ogTitle: Shays Flat vs She Oaks: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Shays Flat and She Oaks.
heading: Shays Flat vs She Oaks — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Shays Flat, Victoria and She Oaks, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: She Oaks has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Shays Flat (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Shays Flat or She Oaks safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Shays Flat has a flood risk score of 35/100, while She Oaks scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Shays Flat scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. She Oaks scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Shays Flat or She Oaks?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. She Oaks has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
